return(function(...)local end,function(T,d,X,D)local Vf,hf,sf,Y,j,Wf,m,rf,b,Kf,Rf,G,Df,O,Qf,Lf,E,W,yf,w,L,jf,Nf,c,l,Yf,U,kf,R,qf,uf,a,Jf,S,e,Bf,I,M,v,N,Sf,Pf,Of,H,ff,g,df,Tf,bf,Xf,f,s,pf,Uf,n,Z,tf,Gf,Ef,A,h,If,Q,Cf,af,Af,x,lf,o,zf,of,F while T do if
